title: Creative Vision Statement
scenario: Develop a creative vision statement for a new art exhibition. The target artifact is a 50-word text that captures the essence of the exhibition and inspires visitors.
constraints: Must use poetic language and metaphors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the vision statement is under 50 words and uses poetic language and metaphors.
Evaluate the tone of the vision statement, ensuring it's creative and inspiring.
Verify that the vision statement accurately captures the essence of the exhibition.
